chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Revision Application No.147 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of M.A. No.9799/2015 3. For hearing of M.A. No.9801/2015 --------------------------------------------- 21.04.2025 Mr. Muhammad Dawood Narejo, advocate for applicant Ms. Amna Ansari, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ------------------------------------- Learned counsel for applicant after arguing the matter at some length does not press the instant criminal revision application and intends to file a civil suit against the respondents in accordance with law. Order accordingly. Instant criminal revision application is dismissed as not pressed along with pending applications. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
